bird.name: 苍鹭
bird.summary: 蒼鷺（学名：Ardea cinerea）又稱灰鷺，為鹭科蒼鷺屬的一种涉禽，也是鹭属的模式種。是歐亞大陸與非洲大陸的濕地中極為常見的水鳥。 生态环境 性格孤僻，嚴冬時節在沼澤邊常可以看到獨立寒風中的蒼鷺。

relations.subject: 苍鹭
relations.evidence: Although most common in the lowlands, it also occurs in mountain tarns, lakes, reservoirs, rivers, marshes, ponds, ditches, flooded areas, coastal lagoons, estuaries, and the sea shore
relations.object_summary: 海湾、泻湖、盐沼与河口组成的复合湿地。

relations.subject: 苍鹭
relations.evidence: Although most common in the lowlands, it also occurs in mountain tarns, lakes, reservoirs, rivers, marshes, ponds, ditches, flooded areas, coastal lagoons, estuaries, and the sea shore
relations.object_summary: 淡水与海水交汇形成的高生产力边缘生态系统。

relations.subject: 苍鹭
relations.evidence: Although most common in the lowlands, it also occurs in mountain tarns, lakes, reservoirs, rivers, marshes, ponds, ditches, flooded areas, coastal lagoons, estuaries, and the sea shore
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。
